$description: Captured 1:1 from components/ui/carousel/carousel.tsx (embla). Prev/Next are Buttons (size icon) parked OUTSIDE the viewport — the offset is a negative inset, so the carousel needs that much clearance around it.

offset.$description: Applied as a NEGATIVE inset (-left-12 / -right-12 / -top-12) — the buttons sit 48px outside the viewport edge.
